hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys
sys.stdin.read()
memory = open('{{HOME}}/.claude/memory/MEMORY.md').read()
rules = open('{{HOME}}/.claude/memory/all_session_basic_rules.md').read()
context = '# MEMORY.md\n' + memory + '\n\n# all_session_basic_rules.md\n' + rules
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': context}}))
"

python3 -c "
import json, sys, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
file_path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
protected = os.path.realpath(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/memory/'))
try:
    real_path = os.path.realpath(file_path) if file_path else ''
except Exception:
    real_path = ''
if real_path.startswith(protected + os.sep) or real_path == protected:
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'deny', 'permissionDecisionReason': 'cc-baseline 경로 보호: ~/.claude/memory/ 는 수동 관리 전용입니다. auto-memory는 ~/.claude/projects/로 시작하는 경로에 저장하세요.'}}))
    sys.exit(2)
"

python3 -c "
import json, sys
sys.stdin.read()
boundary = open('{{HOME}}/.claude/memory/reference_subagent_boundary.md').read()
guide = open('{{HOME}}/.claude/memory/reference_e2e_manager_guide.md').read()
context = '# reference_subagent_boundary.md\n' + boundary + '\n\n# reference_e2e_manager_guide.md\n' + guide
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'additionalContext': context}}))
"
pgrep -f '@anthropic-ai/claude-code' | while read pid; do ppid=$(ps -o ppid= -p $pid 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); if [[ "$ppid" == "1" ]]; then kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null; fi; done
